home.title: Welcome to Munchling
home.description: Track calories and nutrients locally on your device.

profiles.title: Profiles
profiles.description: Create, edit and delete person profiles with individual daily targets.
profiles.empty: No profiles yet. Create your first profile above.
profiles.confirmDelete: Really delete profile "{name}"? Related meal-log portions will also be removed.

form.hint: All targets are daily. Macro and micro targets are optional.

foods.title: Foods
foods.description: Search foods and create custom products with nutrition values per 100g or 100ml.
foods.empty: No foods found. Create your first food above.
foods.confirmDelete: Really delete food "{name}"? Related recipes and meal logs may also be removed.

form.hint: Nutrition values are stored per 100g or 100ml.

scanner.found: EAN {ean} found: {name}. The food was opened for editing.
scanner.notFound: EAN {ean} is not available yet. Fill the remaining fields and save the food.
scanner.onlineFound: EAN {ean} was found on OpenFoodFacts: {name}. The form was prefilled.
scanner.lookupFailed: EAN {ean} was not found locally. Online lookup failed; please fill the fields manually.

bundled.title: BLS food database
bundled.selected: “{name}” was copied from the BLS database. Check the values and save it as a food.
bundled.error: The bundled food database could not be searched.

errors.duplicateName: A food with this name already exists.

recipes.title: Recipes
recipes.description: Create dishes from foods and nested sub-recipes with automatic nutrition calculation.
recipes.empty: No recipes yet. Create your first recipe above.
recipes.confirmDelete: Really delete recipe "{name}"? Linked ingredients and meal logs may also be removed.

form.hint: Add foods or other recipes with gram amounts.

ingredients.title: Ingredients
ingredients.empty: No ingredients yet. Add foods or sub-recipes.

mealLog.title: Log meal
mealLog.description: Assign foods or recipes to one or more profiles with individual portion sizes.

form.hint: Total weight is calculated from the selected profile portions.

portions.title: Portions per profile
portions.noProfiles: Create a profile first to assign meals.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noProfile: Create a profile to see your daily target and meals.
dashboard.noMeals: No meals logged for this profile today.

language.title: Language
language.hint: Your selection is saved and overrides the system language.

theme.title: Appearance
theme.hint: Munchling follows your device light/dark mode and language.
theme.system: The system theme is currently used automatically.

profiles.title: Profiles
profiles.hint: Manage body data, goals, and active profiles.
